name: believers-sword-local-dev
description: Believers Sword is an application for believers community, it is used to study bible, also used for praying, social or connect with other believers.
author: JenuelDev

scripts.serve:electron: set APP_IS_DEV=yes && yarn build && wait-on tcp:3000 && electron .
scripts.app:build: yarn prod:rename && yarn build:front && yarn electron:build && yarn electron:builder
scripts.app:build:beta: set APP_IS_BETA=yes && set APP_IS_DEV=no && set VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://service-dev.believersword.com && yarn beta:rename && yarn build:front && yarn electron:build && yarn electron:builder
scripts.app:build:msix: yarn prod:rename && yarn build:front && yarn electron:build && yarn electron:builder --win appx
scripts.app:build:msix:beta: set APP_IS_BETA=yes && set APP_IS_DEV=no && set VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://service-dev.believersword.com && yarn beta:rename && yarn build:front && yarn electron:build && yarn electron:builder --win appx
scripts.dev:rename: json -I -f package.json -e "this.name='believers-sword-local-dev'" && json -I -f package.json -e "this.build.productName='Believers Sword Local Dev'" && json -I -f package.json -e "this.build.appId='com.official-believers-sword-local-dev.app'"
scripts.beta:rename: json -I -f package.json -e "this.name='believers-sword-beta'" && json -I -f package.json -e "this.build.productName='Believers Sword Beta'" && json -I -f package.json -e "this.build.appId='com.official-believers-sword-beta.app'" && json -I -f package.json -e "this.build.publish[0].channel='beta'"
scripts.prod:rename: json -I -f package.json -e "this.name='believers-sword'" && json -I -f package.json -e "this.build.productName='Believers Sword'" && json -I -f package.json -e "this.build.appId='com.official-believers-sword.app'" && json -I -f package.json -e "this.build.publish[0].channel='latest'"
scripts.untag:beta: node -e "const n=process.argv[1];if(!n){console.error('Usage: yarn untag:beta <number>  (e.g. yarn untag:beta 1)');process.exit(1)}const v='v'+require('./package.json').version+'-beta.'+n,e=require('child_process').execSync;e('git tag -d '+v,{stdio:'inherit'});e('git push origin :refs/tags/'+v,{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.rerelease:beta: node -e "const n=process.argv[1];if(!n){console.error('Usage: yarn rerelease:beta <number>  (e.g. yarn rerelease:beta 1)');process.exit(1)}const e=require('child_process').execSync;e('yarn untag:beta '+n,{stdio:'inherit'});e('yarn release:beta '+n,{stdio:'inherit'})"
